segments.speaker: Stylist
segments.text: Hi, what are we doing today?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I'd like a trim, but not too short.

segments.speaker: Stylist
segments.text: How much do you want to take off?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Maybe about half an inch on top, and clean up the sides and back.

segments.speaker: Stylist
segments.text: Do you want clippers on the sides?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, but not too tight. I still want it to look natural.

segments.speaker: Stylist
segments.text: Got it. Do you have a photo?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, this is close to what I mean. It doesn't have to be exactly the same.

segments.speaker: Stylist
segments.text: No problem. Do you usually style it with product?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: A little, but I prefer something easy to manage.

segments.speaker: Stylist
segments.text: Okay, I'll keep the shape and just clean it up.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Perfect. That's exactly what I'm hoping for.
